items.summary_en: The gala brought together representatives from over 100 member businesses to discuss new opportunities in US-China trade and to honor outstanding members of the year.
items.summary_zh: 本届晚宴汇聚百余家会员企业代表，围绕中美贸易新机遇展开交流，并表彰了年度优秀会员企业。
items.title_en: CCCWA Hosts 2025 Annual Member Business Networking Gala
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州华人总商会举办 2025 年度会员企业交流晚宴

items.summary_en: The chamber organized a member delegation to China, connecting with industrial parks and local governments to advance cooperation around Washington State's leading industries.
items.summary_zh: 商会组织会员企业代表团赴华参访，与多个产业园区及地方政府对接，推动华盛顿州优势产业落地合作。
items.title_en: CCCWA Delegation Attends International Investment & Trade Fair in China
items.title_zh: 商会代表团赴中国出席国际投资贸易洽谈会

items.summary_en: The CCCWA Foundation joined local community groups and businesses to provide supplies and support to families in need across the community.
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州华人总商会基金会联合本地侨团与爱心企业，为有需要的社区家庭提供物资与援助。
items.title_en: CCCWA Foundation Partners with the Community for Charitable Relief
items.title_zh: 商会基金会联合社会各界开展社区公益援助
华盛顿州华人总商会举办 2026 年度会员企业交流晚宴 — 2026-6-08
